characters.appearance: A South Asian woman in her late 20s to early 30s with a medium complexion and a slim build. She has dark brown eyes, well-defined eyebrows, and her black hair is neatly tied back in a bun. Her facial features are symmetrical and she has a professional, pleasant smile.
characters.wardrobe: A dark navy blue business blazer over a light blue collared dress shirt.

characters.appearance: A South Asian young man in his late teens or early 20s with a slim build and a medium complexion. He has short, curly black hair, dark brown eyes, and a clean-shaven face. He has a youthful and expressive face.
characters.wardrobe: A light-colored, off-white or beige button-down shirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially focused and learning, then becomes enthusiastic and confident while explaining the app.

characters.appearance: A South Asian young woman in her late teens or early 20s with a medium build and fair complexion. She has long, wavy dark hair worn down, large dark eyes, and a round face. She wears silver dangling earrings.
characters.wardrobe: A white and light purple patterned top, possibly a kurta, with a v-neck.

Character A says: This coffee is very hot.
Character B says: This coffee is very hot.
Character B says: मुझे इस कॉफ़ी का टेस्ट बहुत पसंद है। [I like the taste of this coffee very much.]
Character A says: I like the taste of this coffee.
Character B says: I like the taste of this coffee.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core product feature: real-time AI tutor practice.
- Shows the practical, everyday nature of the vocabulary.
- Demonstrates the listen-and-repeat learning mechanism.

scenes.scene_label: Explaining the App to a Friend
scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Hey, तुम English कहाँ से सीख रहे हो? [Hey, where are you learning English?]
Character B says: Supernova app पर AI teacher से सीख रहा हूँ। [I'm learning from an AI teacher on the Supernova app.]
Character C says: क्या? समझ नहीं आया। [What? I don't understand.]
Character B says: ये एक app है। इसमें तुम daily AI English teacher के साथ practice कर सकते हो। आज के टाइम में English नहीं आती तो job नहीं मिलती। और तो और, respect भी नहीं मिलती, है ना? इसीलिए मैं रोज़ 10-15 मिनट Supernova app पर AI teacher के साथ practice करता हूँ। कुछ ही दिन हुए हैं, और मेरी English बहुत improve हो गई है। अब मैं बिना डरे confident होकर English बोलता हूँ। और ये बहुत affordable भी है। [This is an app. In this, you can practice daily with an AI English teacher. In today's time, if you don't know English, you don't get a job. Moreover, you don't even get respect, right? That's why I practice daily for 10-15 minutes with the AI teacher on the Supernova app. It's only been a few days, and my English has improved a lot. Now I speak English confidently without fear. And it's very affordable too.]
Character C says: मुझे भी English सीखनी है। पर ऐसे courses तो बहुत costly होते हैं ना? [I also want to learn English. But aren't such courses very costly?]
Character B says: नहीं, ये बहुत affordable है। [No, it's very affordable.]
Character C says: Oh super! मैं अभी Supernova app download करती हूँ। [Oh super! I'm downloading the Supernova app right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions to social proof via peer recommendation.
- Highlights the emotional pain points (jobs, respect) and the solution (confidence, daily practice).
- Addresses price objections by emphasizing affordability without specific pricing.
